episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 390: Wilds of Eldraine Previews
episode.description: James & Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and share thoughts on the latest Wilds of Eldraine previews in Ep 390 of MFF.
